name: Global Palm Resources Holdings Limited
summary: Global Palm Resources Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates as an oil palm producer in Indonesia. The company cultivates, harvests, processes, and sells crude palm oil and palm kernel. It has a land bank of 33,871 hectares located in West Kalimantan. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Singapore. Global Palm Resources Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of GPR Investment Holdings Limited.
